handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260405 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU12345"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1001}
client req_sec_def_opt_params {"req_id":"$req1"}
server sec_def_opt_params {"req_id":"$req1","exchange":"SMART","underlying_con_id":265598,"trading_class":"AAPL","multiplier":"100","expirations":["20260417","20260515"],"strikes":["150","160","170"]}
server sec_def_opt_params {"req_id":"$req1","exchange":"CBOE","underlying_con_id":265598,"trading_class":"AAPL","multiplier":"100","expirations":["20260417"],"strikes":["155","165"]}
server sec_def_opt_params_end {"req_id":"$req1"}
disconnect
